introSection: Stunt Pilot is a steel single rail roller coaster located at Silverwood Theme Park in Athol, Idaho, USA. It is a mirrored version of Wonder Woman Golden Lasso Coaster at Six Flags Fiesta Texas.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Silverwood began teasing their new addition on social media, announcing on September 3, 2020 that a new ride would open in 2021. Stunt Pilot was announced on September 17, 2020. The attraction opened on May 29, 2021.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Stunt Pilot is a mirrored version of the Raptor Track Prototype layout manufactured by Rocky Mountain Construction.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: The ride has white track and red supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: This is the only prototype Raptor clone with 10 cars per train.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: The aviation theme and the name "Stunt Pilot" was chosen as a tribute to the daily air show which took place at Silverwood from 1988 to 1996.

fullText:
Stunt Pilot is a steel single rail roller coaster located at Silverwood Theme Park in Athol, Idaho, USA. It is a mirrored version of Wonder Woman Golden Lasso Coaster at Six Flags Fiesta Texas.

Silverwood began teasing their new addition on social media, announcing on September 3, 2020 that a new ride would open in 2021. Stunt Pilot was announced on September 17, 2020. The attraction opened on May 29, 2021.

Stunt Pilot is a mirrored version of the Raptor Track Prototype layout manufactured by Rocky Mountain Construction.

The ride has white track and red supports.

This is the only prototype Raptor clone with 10 cars per train.

The aviation theme and the name "Stunt Pilot" was chosen as a tribute to the daily air show which took place at Silverwood from 1988 to 1996.
